mentions.note: Liked slightly more than Visa; terrific growth company, periodically cyclical but fundamentally sound.

Down 4% despite beat on top/bottom line due to modest expense guidance miss; 3.7B people on network, most tech-forward system; leading agented AI commerce via Verifiable Intent protocol; stablecoin opportunity unlocking new payment flows; stock too low, oversold.

Tech company in bank clothing; bullish trend channel (higher highs/lows). MACD buy signal last month. RSI trending higher but not overbought. High volume. Hasn't taken January highs yet ($35 resistance at $573). Reports next week with potential capital return catalyst.
